title: Describe habits with detail
subtitle: Add time, place, and reason.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I study English at night because my house is quiet.
我晚上学英语，因为家里很安静。
I try to review old lessons before I learn new ones.
我尽量在学新课前复习旧课。
I study at night because my house is quiet.
我晚上学，因为家里很安静。

items.en: I study English at night because my house is quiet.
items.zh: 我晚上学英语，因为家里很安静。

items.en: I try to review old lessons before I learn new ones.
items.zh: 我尽量在学新课前复习旧课。

items.en: I study at night because my house is quiet.
items.zh: 我晚上学，因为家里很安静。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I study at night because my house is quiet.
lines.zh: 我晚上学，因为家里很安静。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I try to review old lessons before I learn new ones.
lines.zh: 我尽量在学新课前复习旧课。

items.en: I study English at night because my house is quiet.
items.zh: 我晚上学英语，因为家里很安静。

items.en: I try to review old lessons before I learn new ones.
items.zh: 我尽量在学新课前复习旧课。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
